original: You unwrap the scientifically enhanced morsel and toss the bite-sized treat in your mouth. You chew on it for a while, delighting in the juicy meat flavors dancing on your tongue. Once the taste starts to fade, you swallow it all down and wait.

\n\nYou feel a strange itch in your eyes and move to rub them. It takes a while, but eventually the feeling disappears. Upon opening them, it seems like everything looks a little bit different. Curious, you check yourself in the Codex and find that your [pc.eyeColor] irises are much larger than before, and your pupils dilate much faster. You now have the eyes of a canine!
